case_title: MIRSAKOV, RAISSA VS FILMUS, JOSEPH et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24623, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRSAKOV, RAISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILMUS, JOSEPH KUJAT, CHRIS CHRIS' PLUMBING $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,063.00, ACTIONS 756274, 756277 & 756278 ARE CONSOLIDATED ALL DEFTS ARE JOINTLY & SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MIRSAKOV, RAISSA AS TO DEFENDANT FILMUS, JOSEPH KUJAT, CHRIS CHRIS' PLUMBING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT FILMUS, JOSEPH KUJAT, CHRIS CHRIS' PLUMBING
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JOSEPH FILMUS RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRSAKOV, RAISSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FILMUS, JOSEPH KUJAT, CHRIS CHRIS' PLUMBING PLTFF. TO PAY DEFEND. $71 FOR COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
